contests.title: Take Control of Your Membership Buzz
contests.description: We’ve updated how Membership Buzz is delivered to make it easier to see how much you’ve received and what’s still outstanding. Instead of being automatically added to your account, your Buzz is now available to claim when it unlocks each month! [Read more](https://civitai.com/changelog?id=174)!

contests.title: Intermittent Site Issues
contests.description: We’re currently aware of several content-related issues and are actively working to resolve them. You may see images appearing as red boxes, and gallery feeds may intermittently return no results. We apologize for the disruption and appreciate your patience while we work on a fix.

contests.title: New: Buy Buzz with Crypto Deposits!
contests.description: Send supported cryptocurrencies directly to your Civitai wallet and have them automatically converted into Buzz! Multiple coins and networks supported! [Read more](https://civitai.com/changelog?id=171)!
